SEARCH
Package com.group02.tars.service

Interface JobService

All Known Implementing Classes:
JobServiceImpl
public interface JobService
Service contract for job listing and lookup operations.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final record 
    JobService.PagedResult<T>
    Paged service result.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Job>
    findOpenOrClosingJobs()
    Finds jobs whose status is open or closing.
    Job
    getJobById(String jobId)
    Finds a job by id.
    JobService.PagedResult<Job>
    listJobs(String keyword, String module, String status, int page, int size)
    Lists jobs with optional filters and pagination.
    List<String>
    modules()
    Lists distinct module names currently used by jobs.

  • Method Details

    • listJobs

      JobService.PagedResult<Job> listJobs(String keyword, String module, String status, int page, int size) throws IOException
      Lists jobs with optional filters and pagination.
      Parameters:
      keyword - optional keyword matched against job text
      module - optional module filter
      status - optional job status filter
      page - requested page number
      size - requested page size
      Returns:
      paged jobs and pagination metadata
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored job data cannot be read

    • getJobById

      Job getJobById(String jobId) throws IOException, ServiceException
      Finds a job by id.
      Parameters:
      jobId - job id to resolve
      Returns:
      matching job
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored job data cannot be read
      ServiceException - if the job does not exist

    • findOpenOrClosingJobs

      List<Job> findOpenOrClosingJobs() throws IOException
      Finds jobs whose status is open or closing.
      Returns:
      active jobs sorted by creation date descending
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored job data cannot be read

    • modules

      List<String> modules() throws IOException
      Lists distinct module names currently used by jobs.
      Returns:
      sorted module names
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored job data cannot be read
